name: relay10
description: Eight small, on-demand skills for evidence-led repository work with Relay10.

interface.shortDescription: Route, build, review, and release with evidence.
interface.longDescription: A clean-room pack of eight focused skills for research, specification, implementation, debugging, review, release proof, and skill evaluation. The plugin guides workflows and can call the Relay10 CLI; it does not switch the current Codex task model.
defaultPrompt: Route this repository task with the smallest safe Relay10 workflow.
Review this change and separate findings from evidence gaps.
Prepare release proof without publishing anything yet.
